nasb.text: Come to her from the farthest border; Open up her barns, Pile her up like heaps And utterly destroy her, Let nothing be left to her.

esv.text: Come against her from every quarter; open her granaries; pile her up like heaps of grain, and devote her to destruction; let nothing be left of her.

cnv.text: 你們要從四面八方攻擊巴比倫， 打開它的穀倉， 把它堆起來好像堆穀物一樣； 把它徹底消滅， 甚麼都不留下。

ccb.text: 你们要从远方前来攻打巴比伦， 打开她的粮仓， 使她沦为一堆废墟， 彻底毁灭她，不留一物。
